description: Fullstack agentic chat app + native portfolio dashboard + algo trading platform (Indian + US equity, Razorpay INR + Stripe USD billing, BYO Groq/Anthropic past 10-turn free).

open_prs.title: perf(intraday-retention): monthly cadence + partition-aligned cutoff
open_prs.summary: Anchors retention cutoff to first-of-month + skips daily fires after the first successful run of the month. ~70 hr/yr of pipeline wall clock reclaimed.

recent_merges.summary: Intraday backtest correctness + Strategy promotion workflow + Strategies UX + dry-run no-Kite-creds + walk-forward progress indicator + disposable_pg_session helper
maint: include algo.events + algo.intraday_bars in daily compaction

directories.backend: FastAPI app + agents + tools + jobs + pipelines + algo subsystem
directories.backend/agents: LangGraph: 8 sub-agent configs, 11 nodes, graph.py, sub_agents.py, conversation_context.py
directories.backend/jobs: Scheduler executors + pipeline_executor (chains jobs into pipelines)
directories.backend/insights: ScreenQL parser/SQL-gen — 55 fields, LIKE op, Tables sub-mode
directories.backend/db: ORM models (18), Alembic migrations (21), engine.py + duckdb_engine.py + pg_stocks.py
directories.backend/crypto: byo_secrets.py — Fernet encryption for user-supplied LLM keys
directories.backend/algo/backtest: runner.py (period_end_mtm + MIS daily square-off + entry cutoff + intraday timestamps), positions.py (force_close_all), sim_broker.py, walkforward.py (regime_stratified default off + WalkForwardProgress)
directories.backend/algo/strategy: ast.py, repo.py (auto-demote on AST edit), promotion.py (gates), mode_repo.py (audit), runtime_state.py
directories.backend/algo/runtime: intraday_window.py — shared MIS entry-cutoff helper imported by backtest+paper+live
directories.backend/algo/broker: KiteClient (dry_run pinned at construction), credentials_repo, OAuth flow
directories.backend/algo/jobs: intraday_bars_daily_ingest, intraday_bars_retention (monthly gate via PR #222), algo_reconciliation, risk_state_reset, reauth_notify
directories.backend/algo/universe: PIT universe snapshots, stock_master tag resolution
directories.backend/algo/routes: strategies.py (CRUD + clone + PATCH /mode + eligibility), backtest.py, walkforward.py, paper.py, live.py, kill_switch.py, webhooks.py
directories.stocks: Iceberg repository (5,200+ lines): repository.py, cached_repository.py, create_tables.py
directories.frontend/app/(authenticated): 12+ pages: dashboard, analytics, insights, algo-trading/{strategies,live}, admin, settings
directories.frontend/components/algo-trading: StrategiesTab, PromoteModal, BacktestTradeTable, BacktestSummaryCards, WalkForwardSubTab, dryrun/, live/, builder/
directories.frontend/hooks: 19+ SWR data hooks (useStrategies, useBacktestRuns, useWalkForwardRuns, useSchedulerData)
directories.frontend/lib: types/, config (API_URL, BACKEND_URL), apiFetch, downloadCsv, datetime, echarts
directories.e2e: Playwright: 51 specs, 17 page objects, fixtures/, utils/selectors.ts

key_modules.backend/main.py: FastAPI entry — lifespan starts scheduler daemon, registers routers
key_modules.backend/agents/sub_agents.py: Sub-agent tool-calling loop factory (3-regime message construction)
key_modules.backend/llm_fallback.py: FallbackLLM — N-tier cascade with BYO override hook + tool_call ID sanitization
key_modules.backend/llm_byo.py: BYOContext + module-level ContextVar + apply_byo_context + Redis monthly counter
key_modules.backend/token_budget.py: Per-model TPM/RPM/TPD/RPD atomic reserve/release; singleton via get_token_budget()
key_modules.backend/observability.py: LLM usage collector — 30s flush to Iceberg, key_source field for BYO vs platform
key_modules.backend/insights/screen_parser.py: ScreenQL: tokenizer, parser, SQL gen — 55 fields, LIKE op, Tables sub-mode (7 whitelisted tables)
key_modules.backend/jobs/executor.py: 25+ @register_job decorators + pipeline_executor (chains jobs into daily pipelines)
key_modules.backend/jobs/recommendation_engine.py: Monthly-per-scope IST quota — get_or_create_monthly_run is the single chokepoint
Step 3 of daily pipelines — backup → compact → cleanup_orphans_v2
key_modules.backend/maintenance/backup.py: rsync warehouse + catalog.db + 2-rotation; backup_table for per-table; 1800s default timeout
key_modules.backend/market_utils.py: detect_market(ticker), safe_str/safe_sector (NaN-truthy safe), market currency map
key_modules.backend/db/engine.py: get_engine + get_session_factory (cached) + disposable_pg_session (per-call NullPool — scheduler-job safe)
key_modules.backend/db/duckdb_engine.py: Iceberg read engine + metadata cache + invalidate_metadata + query_iceberg_table
key_modules.backend/algo/strategy/promotion.py: check_eligibility — draft→paper gate (backtest+walkforward freshness) + paper→live gate (algo.events order_filled scan)
key_modules.backend/algo/strategy/mode_repo.py: Audit table CRUD (write_transition, list_transitions, has_ever_been, hash_ast)
key_modules.backend/algo/strategy/repo.py: Strategy CRUD + auto-demote on AST edit (UpdateResult.demoted_from)
key_modules.backend/algo/backtest/runner.py: Backtest engine — period_end_mtm, MIS daily square-off honoring square_off_time, MIS entry cutoff, intraday TradeRow ts_ns
key_modules.backend/algo/backtest/positions.py: PositionTracker — apply_fill (BUY/SELL), force_close_all(marks, exit_reason, fill_ts_ns) with opened-after-fill_date guard
key_modules.backend/algo/backtest/sim_broker.py: SimBroker — T+1 open fills, intraday ts_ns resolution, INTRADAY vs DELIVERY fee dispatch
key_modules.backend/algo/backtest/walkforward.py: Walk-forward harness — regime_stratified default off, WalkForwardProgress for live ETA
key_modules.backend/algo/jobs/intraday_bars_daily_in: Nifty 500 keeper — uses stock_master JOIN stock_tags; defaults to 15m only
key_modules.backend/algo/jobs/intraday_bars_retentio: Monthly cadence (PR #222) — first-of-month cutoff, scheduler_runs-detected first-run gate
key_modules.backend/algo/broker/kite_client.py: KiteClient — dry_run pinned at construction (no Kite REST when dry_run=True)
key_modules.backend/algo/routes/strategies.py: CRUD + clone + PATCH /mode + eligibility GET + history GET; list response enriched
key_modules.backend/algo/routes/paper.py: Paper/dry-run/live runtime start — dry-run + source=replay does NOT require Kite creds
key_modules.auth/repo/user_writes.py: Tier→role auto-sync pinch point + post-commit ROLE_PROMOTED/DEMOTED audit
key_modules.auth/repo/byo_repo.py: BYO key CRUD + provider validators (groq/anthropic key prefixes) + chat counter bump
key_modules.frontend/hooks/useStrategies.ts: Strategies list + setStrategyMode + fetchEligibility + cloneStrategy + filterStrategiesByMode helper
key_modules.frontend/hooks/useBacktestRuns.ts: Backtest run polling — TradeRow with opened_at_ts_ns, exit_reason
key_modules.frontend/components/algo-trading/Strateg: Search + status filter + pagination + icon actions + workflow callout + Promote modal mount + archive confirm
key_modules.frontend/components/algo-trading/Promote: Per-target eligibility cards + bypass card (typed-name + reason)
key_modules.frontend/components/algo-trading/Backtes: exit_reason badge, intraday HH:mm IST timestamps, 2-dp money formatting
key_modules.frontend/components/algo-trading/builder: Cadence radio + Product radio + Square-off-time + Entry-cutoff-time (MIS only)
key_modules.frontend/components/admin/PipelineDAG.ts: Pipelines DAG — prefers step.job_name over hardcoded JOB_LABELS map

database.rule: Mutable state → PG. Append-only analytics → Iceberg. DuckDB for ALL Iceberg reads.

gates.paper_to_live: Fresh paper-fill events in algo.events (mode='paper', type='order_filled')

promotion_workflow.auto_demote: AST edit demotes any non-draft → draft (audit row reason='auto-demoted on AST edit')
promotion_workflow.bypass: To-live bypass unlocked after first to_mode='live' in audit history; typed-name confirmation + reason required

scheduler_job_pg_rule.rule: Scheduler-driven async PG callers MUST use disposable_pg_session (per-call NullPool engine). Cached get_session_factory binds asyncpg pool to the uvicorn loop; reusing under asyncio.run from scheduled jobs raises 'Future attached to a different loop'.

key_memories.shared/architecture/strategy-promotion-w: Lifecycle, schema, gate semantics, bypass rules, picker filter matrix
key_memories.shared/architecture/backtest-correctness: Six fixes (period_end_mtm, MIS square-off, entry cutoff, intraday timestamps, date-inversion, formatting)

see_also.CLAUDE.md: Hard rules + patterns (9 sections, Pattern Index at §9)
